description_long: This is a large, heavily armored military tank with a low-profile turret and a long, prominent main cannon extending from the front. The vehicle features a set of six large road wheels on each side, connected by robust tracks designed for traversing rough terrain. The upper hull and turret are covered in angular, sloped armor plating, providing enhanced protection, and the turret is equipped with additional mounted equipment, including antennas and a secondary machine gun. The rear of the tank displays storage racks and external equipment, while the sides are fitted with side skirts for extra defense. The surface is painted in a dark, matte green camouflage, with no visible military insignia or numbers. The overall design emphasizes durability, firepower, and battlefield survivability.
description: A large, dark green armored tank with a long cannon, sloped turret, and heavy tracks. It features side skirts, antennas, and a matte camouflage finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon centered, sloped armor, and the tank's wide tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full length of the cannon, six large road wheels, and side skirts.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals storage racks, rear armor, and the back of the turret.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, tracks, and external equipment.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large main cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof, and two visible antenna mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor plating on the hull and turret; side skirts provide additional protection to the tracks.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green matte paint with subtle weathering; no distinct camouflage pattern visible.
